src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/Const.general_idea: Update the NeTEx profile version constant to 1.14 to align with the new export version.
Add constant for the RutebankenCorrelationId header message.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/confi.general_idea: Remove a no-op default constructor that only called toString() to clean up the class structure.
Remove trailing blank lines at the end of the file to adhere to formatting standards.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.general_idea: Replace javax.xml.bind imports with jakarta.xml.bind to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.why_exists: javax.xml.bind package is removed in Java 11+ and not present in Jakarta EE 9+ runtimes; code fails to compile without the jakarta namespace.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.general_idea: Refactor imports to use wildcard imports and add Camel ExchangeProperty annotation for cleaner code.
Remove Spring @Value injection of configuration property, likely moving configuration handling elsewhere or making it static.
Add method parameter annotated with Camel ExchangeProperty to inject map from Camel exchange context.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.general_idea: Add constant definition for the Camel exchange property key used in the method signature.
Rename local variable from airportIataName to airportIATAName for consistency with naming conventions.
Update logic to conditionally modify PassengerStopAssignment based on NSR Quay map lookup.
Replace explicit type declarations with var keyword for local variables.
Replace explicit type declarations with var keyword for composite frame element.
Reformat method calls to span multiple lines for better readability.
Migrate JAXB import from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.why_exists: javax.xml.bind package is removed from the JDK in Java 11+ and not present in Spring Boot 3 classpath; code fails to compile with 'package javax.xml.bind does not exist'.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.general_idea: Replace Collectors.toList() with Stream.toList() for more concise stream collection.
Replace Collectors.toList() with Stream.toList() and integrate sorting into the stream pipeline.
Remove explicit list sorting call since the list is now sorted during creation via the stream pipeline.
Migrate the import statement for the PostConstruct annotation from the javax.annotation package to the jakarta.annotation package.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and thus Java 21/Spring Boot 3 environments); using the old import causes a compile error 'package javax.annotation does not exist'.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.general_idea: Refactor the createQuayId method to pass arguments directly to the static factory method instead of using intermediate local variables.
Replace the legacy Collectors.toList() collector with the modern Stream.toList() terminal operation introduced in Java 16.
Replace deprecated javax.xml.datatype API with java.time.Duration for Java 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.why_exists: javax.xml.datatype package is part of the legacy JAXB API which was removed from the JDK module system in Java 11 and later; using it without explicit dependencies causes compile errors or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime in Java 21.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.general_idea: Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Java 9+ and not present in Jakarta EE 9+ runtimes; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or compilation error in Spring Boot 3 environments.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/conve.general_idea: Replace Collectors.toList() with the concise Stream.toList() method introduced in Java 16.
